# flows_data_table (Resource)

Creates and manages Data Table resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "flows_data_table" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  name       = "my-data-table"
}

output "data_table_id" {
  value = flows_data_table.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the data table.
- `project_id` (String) ID of the project to create the data table in.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the data table.
